creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Oclair from comment #4)
You ran make (and by extension, portmaster) in an apparently dirty environment.
> but indeed my purpose here for reporting the reproduced bug is solely for documenting the stop in bugzilla
Then show the actual meson-log.txt. What we have here is not documentation, it is noise that only serves to confuse anyone else running into this.

portmaster is not as supported as you think it is anymore.
